title: Character classes in regular expressions should not contain only one character
description: Enforces that character classes in regular expressions are not defined with only one character, as it can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Character class defined with only one character
recommendation: Use character classes with multiple characters
why_is_this_an_issue: Single-character character classes can lead to unexpected behavior due to the lack of flexibility in matching characters.
how_to_fix: Update the character class to include multiple characters.

checks.message: Character class defined with only one character
